build.beforeDevCommand: if [ -f ui/package.json ]; then npm run dev --prefix ui; elif [ -f ../ui/package.json ]; then npm run dev --prefix ../ui; else npm run dev --prefix ../../ui; fi
build.beforeBuildCommand: if [ -f ui/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix ui; elif [ -f ../ui/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix ../ui; else npm run build --prefix ../../ui; fi

security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
